README.md.reason: Baseline factory guidance for the Bicameral Factory Run.

playbooks/devin-bicameral-factory-run.md.reason: Canonical Factory Run playbook followed for this session.

local_setup_divergence.notes: No local-only prompts, aliases, MCP servers, editor rules, scripts, or environment assumptions affected this PR.

roadmap_reconciliation.notes: Factory #243 is the roadmap context for the customer/contributor governance boundary; implemented in integrations#251 (PR #252) with the companion schema extension in bicameral-factory#250 (merged).

state_refinement.release_state: Separate the public customer distribution from contributor-only Factory governance: deterministic fail-closed release-inventory boundary, refined repo descriptor, pinned inter-repo contracts with drift detection, and tracked factory attestations validated in-repo.
invariants: Integrations are evidence-only adapters: they emit candidates, evidence, hints, signals, and advisories but never own canonical state.
The customer release artifact never carries .bicameral/** or contributor-only development material.
Tracked factory attestations are validated fail-closed on filename, schema, factory-commit reconciliation, roadmap reconciliation, and state refinement.

rejected_or_collapsed_states: In-tree attestation storage was previously rejected pending the governance-owner decision; it is now accepted (integrations#249) with a fail-closed validator and release exclusion.
minimization_review.rationale: The release keeps the smallest honest lifecycle: attestations become a tracked, validated, release-excluded state rather than an unbounded .bicameral/ allowance.

state_refinement.notes: State-refinement reconciled against the integrations#249 governance-owner decision.

end_of_session_capture.notes: Companion Factory schema extension captured as bicameral-factory#250 (merged).
